sourcetypes.name: access_combined
sourcetypes.description: Apache combined access logs - HTTP requests to Campaign web tier

sourcetypes.name: access_combined_wcookie
sourcetypes.description: Apache access logs with TLS/cookie details - includes SSL and session info

sourcetypes.name: apache_error
sourcetypes.description: Apache error logs - HTTP errors, module failures
sourcetypes.note: No queries found in this dashboard for apache_error

queries.name: SOAP Router Requests Over Time
queries.spl: index=$index$ host=$server$ sourcetype="access_combined_wcookie" POST OR "soaprouter.jsp" "200 " | timechart span=10m count
queries.description: Track SOAP router POST requests with 200 status over time

queries.name: SOAP Router Requests by Host
queries.spl: index=$index$ host=$server$ sourcetype="access_combined_wcookie" POST OR "soaprouter.jsp" "200 " | timechart span=10m count by host
queries.description: SOAP router requests broken down by host over time

queries.name: SOAP Router Request Count by Host
queries.spl: index=$index$ host=$server$ sourcetype="access_combined_wcookie" POST OR "soaprouter.jsp" "200 " | stats count by host
queries.description: Total SOAP router requests per host

queries.name: SOAP Router Total Count
queries.description: Total count of successful SOAP router requests

queries.name: Top URI Stubs by Host
queries.spl: index=$index$ host=$server$ sourcetype="access_combined_wcookie" POST OR "soaprouter.jsp" " 200 " | eval stub = substr(uri, 1, 55) | stats count by host, site, stub | sort count desc LIMIT=30
queries.description: Top 30 URI stubs grouped by host and site

queries.name: Top Client IPs
queries.spl: index=$index$ host=$server$ sourcetype="access_combined_wcookie" POST OR "soaprouter.jsp" " 200 " | stats count by clientip | sort count desc LIMIT=30
queries.description: Top 30 client IPs making SOAP router requests

queries.name: Client IP and HTTP Status Table
queries.spl: index=$index$ host=$server$ sourcetype="access_combined_wcookie" POST OR "soaprouter.jsp" | rex field=_raw "(?ms)^(?:[^ \n]* ){9}(?P<http_status>\d+)" | ctable clientip http_status maxcols=10 maxrows=10
queries.description: Extract HTTP status codes and display by client IP

queries.name: Interaction API Requests Over Time
queries.spl: index=$index$ host=$server$ sourcetype="access_combined*" "POST /interaction/" OR "GET /interaction/" | timechart span=5m count by host
queries.description: Track Interaction API POST/GET requests across all Apache logs

queries.name: Interaction API Response Time by Host
queries.spl: index=$index$ host=$server$ sourcetype="access_combined_wcookie" "POST /interaction/" | rex field=_raw "(?ms)^(?:[^/\n]*/){7}(?P<resp_time_ms>\d+)" offset_field=_extracted_fields_bounds | timechart span=5m avg(resp_time_ms) by host
queries.description: Average response time for Interaction API calls over time by host

queries.name: Interaction API Response Time by URI
queries.spl: index=$index$ host=$server$ sourcetype="access_combined_wcookie" "POST /interaction/" | rex field=_raw "(?ms)^(?:[^/\n]*/){7}(?P<resp_time_ms>\d+)" offset_field=_extracted_fields_bounds | stats avg(resp_time_ms) by host, uri | sort by avg(resp_time_ms) DESC
queries.description: Average response time by host and URI, sorted by slowest

queries.name: Interaction API Total Count
queries.description: Total count of Interaction API POST requests

queries.name: Interaction API Daily Volume
queries.spl: index=$index$ host=$server$ sourcetype="access_combined_wcookie" "POST /interaction/" | timechart span=1d count
queries.description: Daily count of Interaction API requests

key_fields.description: Client IP address making the request
HTTP response status code (extracted via rex)
Response time in milliseconds (extracted via rex)
